liturgicalColors.name: White
liturgicalColors.use: Easter, Christmas, feasts of Our Lord except Passion, Mary, angels, saints who were not martyrs.

liturgicalColors.name: Violet
liturgicalColors.use: Advent, Lent, penance, and Masses for the dead where customary.

liturgicalColors.name: Red
liturgicalColors.use: Passion, Pentecost, apostles, evangelists, and martyrs.

liturgicalColors.name: Rose
liturgicalColors.use: Gaudete Sunday and Laetare Sunday where used.

liturgicalColors.name: Black
liturgicalColors.use: Masses for the dead where customary.

liturgicalColors.name: Gold
liturgicalColors.use: Solemn or festive use where permitted.
